raw_text:
Director of Platform Engineering

We're seeking an experienced Director of Platform Engineering to lead our platform engineering

practice and drive the technical vision for our internal developer platform products. In this role,

you'll manage a team of 12-15 senior engineers, collaborate with product and customer success

teams, and establish best practices for platform architecture. This director-level position requires

10+ years of experience with deep expertise in Kubernetes, infrastructure-as-code, and developer

tooling, combined with strong leadership capabilities and a track record of building and scaling

high-performing teams.

About the Company

CloudWeave Systems is a Series B infrastructure software company focused on building next-
generation internal developer platforms. We help enterprises reduce friction in their software

delivery pipelines by providing intelligent platform engineering solutions that abstract complexity
while maintaining full control and observability. Our platform is used by hundreds of engineering
teams globally to accelerate deployment cycles and improve developer productivity.

What You'll Own

1. Define and execute the strategic technical roadmap for the platform engineering practice,

aligning with company OKRs and customer needs

2. Lead, mentor, and grow a team of platform engineers, including hiring, performance

management, and career development of direct reports who are themselves team leads or

senior individual contributors

3. Drive architectural decisions around Kubernetes clusters, multi-tenancy patterns, and

infrastructure automation using Terraform and Pulumi

4. Establish standards and best practices for internal developer platform design, leveraging

frameworks like Backstage for developer portals

5. Partner with the VP of Engineering to influence company-wide platform strategy and ensure

alignment across product, infrastructure, and customer engineering teams

6. Represent platform engineering in executive discussions; communicate technical roadmaps

and business impact to C-level stakeholders

7. Champion adoption of Go and Python across the platform engineering organization for

service development and automation tooling

8. Oversee platform reliability and performance metrics, setting SLOs/SLIs and driving

accountability across the team

at CloudWeave Systems — Empowering teams with developer-first infrastructure that scalesSan Francisco, CA (Remote-First) • Full-time • $280,000 - $420,000 base + equity 9. Cultivate relationships with key customers and partners to understand platform needs and

validate product-market fit for infrastructure offerings

Perks & Benefits

Competitive equity package (0.50% - 1.50% depending on experience)
Comprehensive health insurance including medical, dental, and vision with 100% employer

coverage for employee
Annual professional development budget ($5,000) and conference attendance sponsorship
Unlimited PTO with flexible work-from-anywhere policy

 Parental leave (16 weeks paid for all parents) and family-forming benefits

401(k) with 4% company match

Annual executive coaching and leadership development program

Home office stipend ($2,000 initial setup, $500 annual refresh)

Next Steps

Submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your leadership experience and platform

engineering background, and a link to your LinkedIn profile or portfolio to

careers@cloudweave.systems. Please include specific examples of infrastructure projects you've

led and teams you've scaled. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.
